title: Auto-generate spec numbers in sl spec create
description: Remove mandatory --number flag, auto-assign collision-free feature numbers, update AI skill docs

title: Setup: Make --number flag optional
description: Foundation work to make feature number auto-generation possible
design: Modify spec_create.go to remove required validation for --number. Add auto-generate path when flag is empty.

title: Add GetNextAvailableNum to collision.go
description: WHY: Need collision-free auto-increment that checks dirs, local branches, and remote branches.

items.item: Skips numbers with existing dirs or branches
Best-effort remote check (no error on network failure)

design: File: pkg/cli/spec/collision.go. Add GetNextAvailableNum() that calls GetNextFeatureNum() then loops CheckFeatureCollision() up to 100 times, incrementing on collision.
acceptance_criteria: Function returns next available number with zero collisions across local dirs, local branches, and remote branches.

title: Make --number flag optional in spec_create.go
description: WHY: Users should not need to manually specify feature numbers.

items.item: Auto-generate number when flag is empty

design: File: pkg/cli/commands/spec_create.go. Remove required validation for --number. When empty, call spec.GetNextAvailableNum(). Print auto-assigned number to stderr in non-JSON mode.
acceptance_criteria: sl spec create --short-name test succeeds without --number. Manual --number override still works.

title: Add collision suggestion on manual --number conflict
description: WHY: When user provides a number that collides, they need guidance on which number to use instead.

items.item: Error message suggests next available number

design: File: pkg/cli/commands/spec_create.go. On CheckFeatureCollision error, call GetNextAvailableNum and include suggestion in error message.
acceptance_criteria: Collision error includes suggested available number.

title: Add FEATURE_ID to JSON output
description: WHY: AI agents and scripts need a stable feature identifier in the JSON output.

items.item: FeatureID field added to SpecCreateOutput struct

design: File: pkg/cli/commands/spec_create.go. Add FeatureID field to SpecCreateOutput struct, set to branchName.
acceptance_criteria: JSON output includes FEATURE_ID field matching branch name.

title: US1: Auto-generate feature numbers
description: User Story 1: Developer creates features without specifying a number
design: Relies on GetNextAvailableNum and optional --number flag from setup tasks.

title: US2: Manual number override with collision suggestion
description: User Story 2: Developer uses specific number, gets collision guidance
design: Relies on collision suggestion from setup tasks.

title: US3: AI agent creates specs without manual number lookup
description: User Story 3: specledger.specify skill uses auto-generated numbers
design: Update both .claude/commands/specledger.specify.md and pkg/embedded/templates/specledger/commands/specledger.specify.md to remove manual number scanning from step 2.

title: Update specledger.specify skill docs
description: WHY: AI skill still documents manual number scanning which is no longer needed.

items.item: Step 2 simplified in both specify files
FEATURE_ID field documented in JSON output

design: Files: .claude/commands/specledger.specify.md and pkg/embedded/templates/specledger/commands/specledger.specify.md. Simplify step 2 to just run sl spec create --json --short-name. Document new FEATURE_ID field.
acceptance_criteria: Skill docs show simplified command without manual number lookup. FEATURE_ID documented.

title: Unit tests for collision and auto-increment
description: WHY: Verify auto-increment and collision detection work correctly across edge cases.
design: File: pkg/cli/spec/collision_test.go. Tests: GetNextFeatureNum (empty dir, existing features, non-feature dirs), GetNextAvailableNum (no collision, skip collisions), CheckFeatureCollision, ParseFeatureNum.
acceptance_criteria: All 8 tests pass. Covers empty repos, existing features, collision skipping.
